name: Path to Exile
oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Teleportation Circle
oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one target artifact or creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Trouble in Pairs
oracle_text:
If an opponent would begin an extra turn, that player skips that turn instead.
Whenever an opponent attacks you with two or more creatures, draws their second card each turn, or casts their second spell each turn, you draw a card.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Brainstorm
oracle_text: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Cytoplast Manipulator
oracle_text:
Graft 2 (This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever another creature enters, you may move a +1/+1 counter from this creature onto it.)
{U}, {T}: Gain control of target creature with a +1/+1 counter on it for as long as this creature remains on the battlefield.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Ashcoat of the Shadow Swarm
oracle_text:
Whenever Ashcoat attacks or blocks, other Rats you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of Rats you control.
At the beginning of your end step, you may mill four cards. If you do, return up to two Rat creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.)
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Plague of Vermin
oracle_text: Starting with you, each player may pay any amount of life. Repeat this process until no one pays life. Each player creates a 1/1 black Rat creature token for each 1 life they paid this way.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: All Will Be One
oracle_text: Whenever you put one or more counters on a permanent or player, this enchantment deals that much damage to target opponent, creature an opponent controls, or planeswalker an opponent controls.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Silverclad Ferocidons
oracle_text: Enrage — Whenever this creature is dealt damage, each opponent sacrifices a permanent of their choice.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Underworld Breach
oracle_text:
Each nonland card in your graveyard has escape. The escape cost is equal to the card's mana cost plus exile three other cards from your graveyard. (You may cast cards from your graveyard for their escape cost.)
At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this enchantment.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Doubling Season
oracle_text:
If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.
If an effect would put one or more counters on a permanent you control, it puts twice that many of those counters on that permanent instead.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Rhythm of the Wild
oracle_text:
Creature spells you control can't be countered.
Nontoken creatures you control have riot. (They enter with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.)
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

name: Waves of Aggression
oracle_text:
Untap all creatures that attacked this turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.
Retrace (You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying its other costs.)
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Source Material

oracle_text:
